content.problemStatement:
You are given three arrays AAA, BBB, and CCC, all of length NNN. You also have two integers k1k_1k1‚Äč and k2k_2k2‚Äč.

For every index 1‚Č§i‚Č§N1 \leq i \leq N1‚Č§i‚Č§N, you must choose **exactly one** of Ai,BiA_i, B_iAi‚Äč,Bi‚Äč, or CiC_iCi‚Äč. Find the **maximum** possible sum of chosen elements, such that:


At most k1k_1k1‚Äč elements are picked from AAA, and
At most k2k_2k2‚Äč elements are picked from BBB

Input Format

The first line of input contains an integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases. TTT test cases follow.
Each test case consists of five lines of input.
The first line of each test case contains the integer NNN ‚ÄĒ the length of the arrays.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.
The third line contains NNN space-separated integers B1,B2,‚Ä¶,BNB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_NB1‚Äč,B2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,BN‚Äč.
The fourth line contains NNN space-separated integers C1,C2,‚Ä¶,CNC_1, C_2, \ldots, C_NC1‚Äč,C2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,CN‚Äč.
The fifth line contains two space-separated integers k1k_1k1‚Äč and k2k_2k2‚Äč.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the maximum sum possible by selecting the elements under the specified constraints.
constraints: It is guaranteed that the sum of NNN across all test cases doesn't exceed 5‚čÖ1055 \cdot 10^55‚čÖ105.
